notes: v391 — Fix: adding a 🎯 My-pick on a phone now shows its result right at the form. The ＋ Add button always worked, but if a pick was rejected (e.g. the 🛑 stop wasn't below the buy price, or the code isn't in your loaded data) the reason appeared at the top of the panel — off-screen on a phone — so ＋ Add looked dead. Now you get a clear message right under the button: green ✓ when it's added, red with the reason when it's not. Tip: your stop must be BELOW your buy price and your sell ABOVE it. Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
